dialogueChunks.intro: They found out, {player_name}. Someone talked, and now {quest_threat} knows we're organizing.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The settlement is locked down. No one enters or leaves without a checkpoint. {target_npc} was arrested this morning and is being held in the guard barracks. We need to get them out before they're forced to name everyone. Our contact among the guards can create a distraction, but we need {quest_item} to bribe the supply officer and access the back gate {location_hint}. We must {quest_action} before everything falls apart.
dialogueChunks.outro: If {target_npc} breaks under pressure, everyone involved is finished. We have to act tonight.

playerResponses.text: Bribe the officer, free {target_npc}, and make the move. I'm ready.
Prison breaks and bribes? This revolt just went from simmering to boiling.
Jailbreaks are a line I won't cross. You're on your own.

dialogueChunks.plotStep: They sent mercenaries to destroy what we built. Burned half of it and scattered the supplies. {target_npc} managed to save some {quest_item}, but the route {location_hint} is now patrolled by hired swords and {enemy_type} they've been using as attack dogs. We need to rebuild, restock, and clear the route to continue our efforts to {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: They want us to surrender. They want {quest_stakes} to accept that freedom is a privilege they control. We refuse.

playerResponses.text: Mercenaries and attack dogs? They're afraid of us. Good. Let's rebuild.
The opposition is playing rough. I'll play rougher.
They brought mercenaries? This is an arms race I can't win.

dialogueChunks.intro: We've been betrayed from within, {player_name}. One of our own sold us out.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Someone in the resistance has been feeding information to {quest_threat}. {target_npc} figured it out when a supply run was ambushed at the exact location only our inner circle knew. The informant escaped with {quest_item} heading {location_hint} to deliver it to the {enemy_type} contacts. If that delivery reaches them, our efforts to {quest_action} are finished.
dialogueChunks.outro: Trust is the only weapon we have left. If we can't trust each other, {quest_stakes} lose everything.

playerResponses.text: A traitor in the ranks? I'll intercept the delivery and find out who.
Betrayal and interception. This is getting complicated, but I'll do it.
Internal betrayal means your movement is compromised. I'm stepping away.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the stakes just went up. {quest_threat} has called for reinforcements.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A messenger was spotted riding out at dawn for the regional garrison. If reinforcements arrive, our fight to {quest_action} is over before it starts. {target_npc} says we have three days at most. We need to gather enough {quest_item} to sustain the settlement independently, rally the remaining families, and blockade the main road {location_hint} before the troops arrive.
dialogueChunks.outro: Three days to change everything. Three days to prove that {quest_stakes} will not be ruled by fear.

playerResponses.text: Three days? Then we don't waste a single hour. Let's move.
A race against reinforcements? The pressure just tripled. I'll make it count.
Blockading a road against a professional garrison? That's a battle, not a revolt.
